description: cli-skill contributor automation. Runs validation and tests on saves — solo contributor scale.

hooks.command:
bash -c '
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", d.get(\"path\", \"\")))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

# Validate plugin.json or SKILL.md on save
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(plugin\.json|SKILL\.md)$"; then
  echo "[dev] plugin file saved — run /plugin-dev:plugin-validator to validate" >&2
fi

# Run unit tests when a hook script is saved
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "hooks/.*\.py$"; then
  python3 -m pytest tests/unit/ -q 2>&1 | tail -3 >&2 || true
fi

echo "{\"continue\":true}"
'
